content.en:
"It's a lost beast!"

Ye Tian came to the core area of this Lost Land, where he saw a Lost Behemoth that was sleeping.

The lost beast was lying in the middle of a black river, its massive body occupying almost half of the river, its eyes closed.

And there is a special power that permeates it, and it is this force that caused the birth of this lost land.

Ye Tian didn't dare to go over and disturb this lost beast because it was too terrifying!

"Even if it is a high-level immeasurable lifeform, it is far beyond the ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeform, and it may even instantly kill the weaker high-level immeasurable lifeform!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If he woke up this lost beast, he would definitely be killed instantly, and there was no way to fight it.

"What's that?"

Ye Tian noticed that some gray crystalline matter had been born around this lost giant beast, which seemed to be very extraordinary.

"It should be a good thing!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He was going to try to see if he could take the gray crystals!

Immediately, he retracted his breath and approached the Lost Behemoth, but just as he was about to touch the gray crystal, the Lost Behemoth awoke.

In an instant, a claw grabbed it.

It seemed to be a very simple move, but it blocked Ye Tian's movements, and no matter how much strength he exploded, he couldn't break free.

Rumble!!!

Under the blow, Ye Tian's body was annihilated, and this lost place also trembled slightly, but it quickly regained its calm.

......

"The Lost Behemoth is terrifying, one move is enough to kill me in seconds!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The loss of a replica body was nothing, but it made him understand the secrets of the Lost Lands and the immeasurable sea of suffering.

It turns out that these lost places are caused by the diffuse power of those lost beasts, and the strength of these lost beasts is probably at the lowest level of high-level immeasurable life form realm.

"If you extrapolate like this, there must be a lot of Lost Behemoths in the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering, what a terrifying race so many Lost Behemoths must be!"

Ye Tian felt that if these lost beasts came out of the immeasurable sea of suffering, which force could stop them?

However, these lost beasts seem to like to sleep, and as long as they are not disturbed, there is no danger.

"Do you want to give up?"

Ye Tian was a little hesitant, after all, those gray crystals should be a good thing, if he found a way not to attract the attention of the Lost Behemoth, he should be able to take those gray crystals.

And it's too hard to do this, but it's not hopeless!

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered several lost places and tried to get close to the Lost Behemoth, although they all failed, but he also summed up his experience.

First of all, the Lost Behemoth should identify danger based on the realm of Lost Power it has condensed, and this kind of realm is not a realm that envelops the entire Lost Land, but a small area near itself, and entering this realm will attract the attention of the Lost Behemoth.

And if you want not to attract the attention of the Lost Behemoth, you must merge into the Lost Power of the realm and become a part of it, so as to reduce the attention of the Lost Behemoth.

In this way, these lost beasts will not wake up from their slumber.

In order to successfully approach the Lost Beast, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the power of this Lost Realm outside the Lost Beast Domain.

Time flies, and in the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of realms have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had almost understood the mystery of the Lost Realm.

"Almost!"

Immediately, Ye Tian turned into a wisp of lost power and entered the realm of this lost giant beast, but the lost giant beast did not wake up.

Then, Ye Tian came to the vicinity of the gray crystal.

I saw Ye Tian grasp it lightly, and a gray crystal fell into Ye Tian's hand.

He knew very well that if he touched the Lost Behemoth, the Lost Behemoth would still wake up, and he was very careful not to even take the gray crystals from the Lost Behemoth, only the nearby gray crystals.

Soon, all the gray crystals that could be taken away were taken away by Ye Tian.

"Gone!"

Ye Tian left slowly, and soon left this lost place.

......

After going out, Ye Tian began to study the usefulness of these gray crystals.

This is supposed to be the companion of the Lost Behemoth, and it contains terrifying energy inside, and it should be very useful.

After many attempts and researches, Ye Tian finally knew the usefulness of this gray crystal.

"It can be tempered with immeasurable will!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

You must know that at his level, it is very difficult for the immeasurable will to be improved, and the effect of refining the immeasurable will with gray crystals is too terrifying.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to use the gray crystal to successfully raise the immeasurable will to the level of 200 scales.

"With these gray crystals, my immeasurable will will increase wildly, and when I step into the mid-level immeasurable lifeform, it will be easier for the immeasurable will to be raised!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he started collecting the gray crystals.

Although the Sea of Infinite Suffering was very large, the number of Lost Behemoths was only a few hundred, and some of the Lost Behemoths were too deep to be found.

For example, the lost beast in the red mountain, he didn't find it.

He felt that it should be the strength of the Lost Behemoth of the Red Mountain that was stronger, so with his strength, he couldn't find the other party.

In the end, Ye Tian collected hundreds of thousands of gray crystals, which was enough for him to use for a long time.

Not only that, but he also found a lot of immeasurable origin qi during this time.

"It's time to hit the realm of mid-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Truncate the skytower.

Ye Tian was ready to attack the mid-level immeasurable lifeforms here, and he had prepared the resources for the breakthrough.

And these Supreme Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building knew that Ye Tian was going to break through the realm of middle-level immeasurable life forms, and they came here one by one to guard.

Although no Xeon Being dared to cause trouble, they also had to prevent this from happening.

Soon, Ye Tian began to break through!

For him, breaking this bottleneck could not have been easier.

Airplanes!!!

Wisps of immeasurable origin qi were absorbed by Ye Tian's body, helping him to be promoted perfectly.

When he absorbed five wisps of immeasurable origin qi, his body was still absorbing it.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian was a little stunned, but soon understood.

"Absorbing five wisps of immeasurable origin qi can be 100% perfect, but it doesn't mean that there is no way to continue to absorb more immeasurable origin qi!"

Ye Tian didn't know what the benefits of absorbing more Infinite Origin Qi were, but now he had enough Infinite Origin Qi in his hand, so he was not stingy and directly absorbed more Infinite Origin Qi.

Six wisps!

Seven wisps!

Eight wisps!

In the end, Ye Tian absorbed thirteen wisps of immeasurable origin qi before he could continue to absorb it, which had already reached the limit of his body's capacity.

Rumble!!!!

The bottleneck was torn apart, and Ye Tian's life level was officially broken, and he stepped into the realm of a middle-level immeasurable life body.

At the same time, his body began to transform, frantically absorbing the energy of the outside world to complete the transformation, and the life level, cultivation, strength, and immeasurable will on his body were all skyrocketing rapidly.

Every moment, Ye Tian's strength was improving.

One precious resource after another was taken out by Ye Tian and devoured, and it was not until a long time later that he completely stabilized the realm of a middle-level immeasurable life form.
